entities.description: teenage boy with slim build, short dark hair, wearing a blue hooded raincoat and dark pants, wet from rain
small gray cat with sleek body, bright eyes, pointed ears, wet fur, expressive face
quiet city street at night in heavy rain, puddles, streetlights, dark building silhouettes
manga speech bubble used to show the gray cat speaking, no readable text

panels.summary: Wide establishing shot of the rainy night street, streetlights reflected in puddles, the boy in a hooded raincoat walking alone through the downpour.
Medium shot as the boy stops beside a puddle, noticing the small gray cat sitting under a narrow awning, both figures framed by diagonal rain lines.
Close-up dramatic composition: the gray cat looks up with bright eyes and an open mouth, a blank speech bubble above it, while the startled boy leans back in surprise.
Final panel with the boy crouching beside the gray cat under the awning, their reflections visible in the wet pavement, the rain continuing around them with a mysterious quiet mood.
